prevalence.source: Gynecology and STI epidemiology syntheses; FEBRASGO context
prevalence.trend: stable; recurrent cases linked to diabetes and antibiotic use

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; substantial discomfort and recurrence burden

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical symptoms (itching, discharge) plus microscopy (KOH/wet mount) or culture for recurrent/nonresponsive cases

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High for acute episodes; recurrent cases require longer regimens

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis common; microscopy/culture available in gynecology services
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Topical azoles or oral fluconazole; extended regimens for recurrent disease; treat contributing factors
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Self-medication and recurrent cases without adequate diagnostic confirmation
